[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29591105/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Watch and Listen Studios, Podcast Strategy, Production &amp; Consulting</title>
<meta name="description" content="Watch and Listen Studios is a full-service podcast production and consulting agency, for best in breed podcast content.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,500&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --ink:#111110;
    --panel:#1B1A17;
    --panel-2:#46423A;
    --paper:#F2EEE4;
    --paper-dim:#a9a296;
    --white:#FFFFFF;
    --offwhite:#F5F3EE;
    --dark:#1B1A17;
    --dark-dim:#5b564c;
    --gold:#B8862E;
    --gold-bright:#D8A94E;
    --gold-dim:rgba(216,169,78,0.12);
    --line-dark:rgba(242,238,228,0.10);
    --line-dark-strong:rgba(242,238,228,0.18);
    --line-light:rgba(27,26,23,0.10);
    --line-light-strong:rgba(27,26,23,0.18);
    --max:1240px;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    margin:0;background:var(--ink);color:var(--paper);
    font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.65;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  h1,h2,h3{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-weight:500;margin:0;letter-spacing:-0.005em;}
  a{color:inherit;}
  img{max-width:100%;display:block;}
  .wrap{max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto;padding:0 32px;}
  .mono{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;}
  .eyebrow{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold-bright);}
  .sr-only{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;}
  ::selection{background:var(--gold);color:#111;}

  .zone-dark{background:
    radial-gradient(1000px 500px at 10% 0%, rgba(216,169,78,0.06), transparent 60%),
    var(--ink);color:var(--paper);}
  .zone-dark .eyebrow{color:var(--gold-bright);}

  .zone-light{background:var(--white);color:var(--dark);}
  .zone-light .eyebrow{color:var(--gold);}

  header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;background:rgba(17,17,16,0.86);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line-dark);}
  .nav{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;align-items:center;padding:22px 0;gap:20px;}
  .brand{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-weight:500;font-size:15px;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:0.01em;color:var(--paper);}
  .brand em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold-bright);text-transform:none;}
  nav.links ul{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:28px;margin:0;padding:0;justify-self:center;}
  nav.links a{text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;color:var(--paper-dim);}
  nav.links a:hover{color:var(--gold-bright);}
  .nav-cta{justify-self:end;font-size:13px;text-decoration:none;color:var(--paper);border:1px solid var(--line-dark-strong);padding:10px 20px;border-radius:999px;white-space:nowrap;transition:border-color .2s ease,color .2s ease;}
  .nav-cta:hover{border-color:var(--gold-bright);color:var(--gold-bright);}
  .nav-toggle{display:none;}

  .hero{padding:0 0 80px;text-align:center;}
  .hero-visual{
    position:relative;
    width:100vw;left:50%;right:50%;margin-left:-50vw;margin-right:-50vw;
    aspect-ratio:1800/1013;overflow:hidden;
    -webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, black 82%, transparent 100%);
    mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, black 82%, transparent 100%);
  }
  .hero-image{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;}
  #waveform{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;mix-blend-mode:screen;opacity:0.5;pointer-events:none;}
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ #waveform{opacity:.22;} }
  .cta-row-wrap{margin-top:-40px;}
  .cta-row{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;position:relative;z-index:2;}
  .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:15px 30px;font-size:14px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;border-radius:999px;transition:transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease, background .18s ease, border-color .18s ease;}
  .btn-solid{background:var(--gold-bright);color:#191510;box-shadow:0 10px 30px -10px rgba(216,169,78,0.5);}
  .btn-solid:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 16px 34px -10px rgba(216,169,78,0.65);}

  section{padding:96px 0;position:relative;z-index:1;}
  .wave-strap{position:relative;height:0;z-index:5;pointer-events:none;}
  .wave-strap svg{position:absolute;left:50%;top:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:min(1300px,94vw);height:auto;overflow:visible;}
  .section-head{max-width:680px;margin-bottom:52px;}
  .section-head h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4.2vw,44px);margin-top:12px;}
  .zone-dark .section-head p{color:var(--paper-dim);margin-top:16px;font-size:17px;}
  .zone-light .section-head p{color:var(--dark-dim);margin-top:16px;font-size:17px;}

  .why-pod{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr 0.8fr;gap:60px;align-items:start;}
  .why-pod p{color:var(--dark-dim);margin:0 0 18px;}
  .closer{margin-top:26px;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--dark);}
  .stat-strip{
    border:1px solid var(--line-light-strong);border-radius:20px;padding:36px;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg, var(--gold-dim), rgba(0,0,0,0.01) 65%);
    box-shadow:0 30px 60px -30px rgba(27,26,23,0.25);
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  }
  .stat-strip .big{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:64px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold);line-height:1;}
  .stat-strip p{color:var(--dark-dim);margin-top:14px;font-size:15px;}
  .stat-strip a{color:var(--gold);text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:3px;font-size:13px;}

  .vu-divider{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:28px;align-items:flex-end;height:14px;}
  .vu-divider span{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--line-dark-strong);animation:vupulse 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;}
  .vu-divider span:nth-child(4n){background:var(--gold-bright);}
  .vu-divider span:nth-child(7n){background:var(--gold-bright);opacity:0.6;}
  @keyframes vupulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(0.7);opacity:.5;}50%{transform:scale(1.15);opacity:1;}}
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .vu-divider span{animation:none;} }

  .reasons{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:20px;}
  .reason{
    background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line-dark);border-radius:16px;padding:30px 26px;
    box-shadow:0 18px 40px -22px rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
    transition:transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease, border-color .2s ease;
  }
  .reason:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 24px 48px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);border-color:var(--line-dark-strong);}
  .reason p{margin:0;color:var(--paper-dim);font-size:15px;}
  .reason .tag{display:block;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:10px;}

  .carousel-wrap{margin-bottom:8px;}
  .carousel{display:flex;gap:20px;overflow-x:auto;padding:6px 2px 18px;scroll-snap-type:x mandatory;}
  .carousel::-webkit-scrollbar{height:6px;}
  .carousel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--line-light-strong);border-radius:3px;}
  .cover-tile{scroll-snap-align:start;flex-shrink:0;width:180px;text-decoration:none;color:var(--dark);transition:transform .2s ease;}
  .cover-tile:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);}
  .cover-tile .art{width:180px;height:180px;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 20px 40px -20px rgba(27,26,23,0.35);border:1px solid var(--line-light);}
  .cover-tile .art img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
  .cover-tile .name{margin-top:10px;font-size:13px;color:var(--dark-dim);line-height:1.3;}

  .accordion{border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line-dark);box-shadow:0 20px 50px -25px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);}
  .acc-item{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line-dark);}
  .acc-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .acc-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;padding:26px 28px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;width:100%;text-align:left;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;color:var(--paper);}
  .acc-head h3{font-size:20px;}
  .acc-head .plus{font-size:22px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;transition:transform .2s ease;flex-shrink:0;color:var(--paper-dim);}
  .acc-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;flex-shrink:0;}
  .acc-item.open{background:var(--offwhite);}
  .acc-item.open .acc-head{color:var(--dark);}
  .acc-item.open .plus{transform:rotate(45deg);color:var(--gold);}
  .acc-item.open .acc-body p{color:var(--dark-dim);}
  .acc-body{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .3s ease;}
  .acc-item.open .acc-body{max-height:200px;}
  .acc-body p{margin:0 0 26px;color:var(--paper-dim);max-width:640px;padding:0 28px 0;}
  .mini-wave{display:inline-flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:16px;vertical-align:middle;}
  .mini-wave span{display:block;width:2.5px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--paper-dim);}
  .acc-item.open .mini-wave span{background:var(--gold);}

  .about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.3fr 0.7fr;gap:60px;}
  .about-grid p{color:var(--dark-dim);}
  .about-grid p + p{margin-top:18px;}
  .awards{background:var(--offwhite);border:1px solid var(--line-light);border-radius:18px;padding:32px;box-shadow:0 20px 50px -30px rgba(27,26,23,0.2);height:fit-content;}
  .award{border-top:1px solid var(--line-light);padding:20px 0;}
  .award:first-child{border-top:none;padding-top:0;}
  .award .yr{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--gold);}
  .award strong{display:block;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:17px;margin-top:4px;font-weight:500;color:var(--dark);}
  .award span.detail{font-size:13px;color:var(--dark-dim);}
  .eq-line{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;width:100%;height:48px;margin-bottom:32px;}
  .eq-line span{flex:1;display:block;border-radius:3px;min-width:3px;max-width:6px;background:linear-gradient(180deg, var(--gold-bright), var(--gold));animation:eqpulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;}
  @keyframes eqpulse{0%,100%{transform:scaleY(0.28);opacity:.5;}50%{transform:scaleY(1);opacity:1;}}
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .eq-line span{animation:none;opacity:.85;} }

  .pod-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;}
  .pod-card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line-dark);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;box-shadow:0 18px 40px -24px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);transition:transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease, border-color .2s ease;scroll-margin-top:110px;}
  .pod-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 26px 50px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);border-color:var(--line-dark-strong);}
  .pod-card .art{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:4px;}
  .pod-card .art img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
  .pod-tag{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--gold-bright);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;}
  .fingerprint{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;height:22px;margin:2px 0 2px;}
  .fingerprint span{display:block;width:3px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--paper-dim);opacity:0.45;}
  .pod-card h3{font-size:19px;margin-top:2px;}
  .pod-card .client{color:var(--paper-dim);font-size:13px;margin-top:-6px;}
  .pod-card p.desc{color:var(--paper-dim);font-size:14px;flex-grow:1;margin:0;}
  .badges{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--line-dark-strong);text-decoration:none;color:var(--paper);text-transform:uppercase;transition:background .15s ease,color .15s ease,border-color .15s ease;}
  .badge:hover{background:var(--gold-bright);color:#191510;border-color:var(--gold-bright);}

  .contact-panel{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line-dark);border-radius:22px;padding:56px;box-shadow:0 30px 60px -28px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);}
  .contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:0.8fr 1.2fr;gap:60px;}
  .contact-info a.email{display:inline-block;margin-top:14px;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-style:italic;font-size:22px;color:var(--gold-bright);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold-bright);word-break:break-word;}
  form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;}
  .f-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .field{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line-dark-strong);padding:16px 0;}
  .field.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
  label{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;color:var(--paper-dim);display:block;margin-bottom:6px;}
  input,textarea{width:100%;background:transparent;border:none;color:var(--paper);font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding:4px 0;outline:none;}
  textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:70px;}
  ::placeholder{color:rgba(242,238,228,0.3);}
  .submit-btn{margin-top:26px;align-self:flex-start;background:var(--gold-bright);color:#191510;border:none;border-radius:999px;padding:16px 34px;font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 14px 30px -14px rgba(216,169,78,0.5);transition:transform .15s ease;}
  .submit-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}

  footer{padding:36px 0;}
  .footer-inner{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--paper-dim);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.04em;}
  footer a{text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line-dark-strong);}

  a:focus-visible, button:focus-visible, .badge:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--gold-bright);outline-offset:2px;}

  @media (max-width:900px){
    .why-pod, .about-grid, .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .pod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
    .contact-panel{padding:32px;}
    nav.links{display:none;}
    .nav-toggle{display:block;justify-self:end;background:none;border:1px solid var(--line-dark-strong);border-radius:999px;color:var(--paper);padding:8px 14px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;}
    .nav{grid-template-columns:1fr auto;}
  }
  @media (max-width:560px){
    .wrap{padding:0 20px;}
    .f-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .pod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .hero{padding:36px 0 56px;}
    .contact-panel{padding:24px;}
  }
  /* ---- zone-flip overrides: Services now light, About now dark, Podcasts now light ---- */
  #services .accordion{background:transparent;border-color:var(--line-light);box-shadow:0 20px 50px -30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);}
  #services .acc-item{background:#fff;border-bottom-color:var(--line-light);}
  #services .acc-head{color:var(--dark);}
  #services .acc-head .plus{color:var(--dark-dim);}
  #services .acc-item.open{background:#111110;}
  #services .acc-item.open .acc-head{color:var(--paper);}
  #services .acc-item.open .plus{color:var(--gold-bright);}
  #services .acc-item.open .acc-body p{color:var(--paper-dim);}
  #services .acc-body p{color:var(--paper-dim);}
  #services .mini-wave span{background:var(--dark-dim);}
  #services .acc-item.open .mini-wave span{background:var(--gold-bright);}
  .zone-light .badge{border-color:var(--line-light-strong);color:var(--dark);}
  .zone-light .badge:hover{color:#191510;}

  .zone-dark .about-grid p{color:var(--paper-dim);}
  #about .awards{background:var(--offwhite);border-color:var(--line-light);box-shadow:0 20px 50px -30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);}
  #about .award{border-top-color:var(--line-light);}
  #about .award strong{color:var(--dark);}
  #about .award span.detail{color:var(--dark-dim);}
  #about .award .yr{color:var(--gold);}

  .zone-light .pod-card{background:#fff;border-color:var(--line-light);box-shadow:0 18px 40px -26px rgba(27,26,23,0.3);}
  .zone-light .pod-card:hover{box-shadow:0 26px 50px -22px rgba(27,26,23,0.35);border-color:var(--line-light-strong);}
  .zone-light .pod-card .client,
  .zone-light .pod-card p.desc{color:var(--dark-dim);}
  .zone-light .fingerprint span{background:var(--dark-dim);}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="wrap nav">
    <a href="#top" class="brand">Watch <em>and</em> Listen Studios</a>
    <nav class="links">
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#why-podcast">Why a Podcast?</a></li>
        <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
        <li><a href="#podcasts">Podcasts</a></li>
        <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
      </ul>
    </nav>
    <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Book a call</a>
    <button class="nav-toggle" onclick="document.querySelector('nav.links ul').style.cssText+='display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:absolute;top:64px;right:32px;background:#1B1A17;border:1px solid rgba(242,238,228,0.15);padding:20px;border-radius:12px;gap:16px;'">Menu</button>
  </div>
</header>

<main id="top">

  <section class="hero zone-dark">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h1 class="sr-only">Watch and Listen Studios. Full-service podcast production and consulting agency, for best in breed podcast content.</h1>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-visual" id="hero">
      <img class="hero-image" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Watch and Listen Studios, full-service podcast production and consulting agency, for best in breed podcast content.">
      <canvas id="waveform" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="wrap cta-row-wrap">
      <div class="cta-row">
        <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-solid">Book a 30 min free call</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="why-podcast" class="zone-light">
    <div class="wrap why-pod">
      <div>
        <span class="eyebrow">Why Create a podcast?</span>
        <h2 style="margin-top:12px;font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,40px);color:var(--dark);">Be where your audience is.</h2>
        <p style="margin-top:24px;">Podcasts reach about 52% of Australians, nearly 10 million people, every month. That's more than double the 25% tuning in monthly, back in 2020.</p>
        <p>The purpose of your podcast, who it's for and what you want to achieve, are core to the strategy we work through with you. It helps frame the direction, format, time and investment needed to produce a podcast that's right for you and your audience.</p>
        <p>Done well, a podcast is a creative, information-rich piece of content that should be woven into your broader marketing strategy.</p>
        <p>Podcasts have a long tail, so we build in promotional opportunities that stretch beyond launch to help reach your audience and grow your podcast.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-strip">
        <div class="big">52%</div>
        <p>of Australians, close to 10 million people, listen to a podcast each month, up from 25% in 2020.</p>
        <p style="margin-top:22px;"><a href="https://cra.au/en/media-releases/majority-rules-more-than-half-of-australians-consume-podcasts-each-month" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Source: Commercial Radio &amp; Audio (CRA) →</a></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="why-us" class="zone-dark">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="section-head">
        <span class="eyebrow">Why Watch and Listen Studios?</span>
        <h2>High quality production and depth of experience.</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="vu-divider" aria-hidden="true">
        <span style="animation-delay:0s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.05s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.1s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.15s"></span>
        <span style="animation-delay:.2s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.25s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.3s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.35s"></span>
        <span style="animation-delay:.4s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.45s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.5s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.55s"></span>
        <span style="animation-delay:.6s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.65s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.7s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.75s"></span>
        <span style="animation-delay:.8s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.85s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.9s"></span><span style="animation-delay:.95s"></span>
      </div>
      <div class="reasons">
        <div class="reason">
          <span class="tag">Partnerships</span>
          <p>Access to award winning, industry professionals who will partner with you, removing creative chaos from the process.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="reason">
          <span class="tag">Broad Industry Experience</span>
          <p>Rather than being siloed, we've produced podcasts across a spectrum of industries, including superannuation, sexual wellness, leadership consulting, music software and medicine.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="reason">
          <span class="tag">Relationships</span>
          <p>We've built strong relationships with industry professionals, incl. TV Presenter Andrew Daddo (Subaru's Great Australian Detour Kids' Cast), ABC hosts Michelle Ainsworth (The Churchill Changemakers), Richelle Hunt (Berry Street Stories) and Jacinta Parsons (The Ageing Ideal).</p>
        </div>
        <div class="reason">
          <span class="tag">Voice Coaching and Workshops</span>
          <p>Coaching to ensure you, your guests and/or colleagues are as comfortable as possible in front of the mic. Workshops to enable you and/or your colleagues to fulfil any stage of the process.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="reason">
          <span class="tag">Marketing</span>
          <p>50% of a podcast's success is driven by marketing, so we build in an early focus for preparing marketing and promotional strategies, ready for launch and beyond.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="reason">
          <span class="tag">In-house Voiceover and Host</span>
          <p>If your preference of host isn't available, Director of Watch and Listen Studios, Nicole Goodman, is a voice over artist who can host, interview and read ads and promotions.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="services" class="zone-light">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="section-head">
        <span class="eyebrow">Services</span>
        <h2>From strategy to growth.</h2>
        <p>Watch and Listen can manage the journey in whole or in part. Click a service to find out more.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="accordion" id="accordion">
        <div class="acc-item open">
          <button class="acc-head" aria-expanded="true">
            <h3>Strategy &amp; consulting</h3>
            <span class="acc-right"><span class="mini-wave" aria-hidden="true"><span style="height:40%"></span><span style="height:80%"></span><span style="height:55%"></span><span style="height:95%"></span><span style="height:30%"></span></span><span class="plus">+</span></span>
          </button>
          <div class="acc-body"><p>A half-day strategy session with decision-makers in the room. We confirm your "why," positioning, format, interview or narrative, brand voice, marketing and distribution. Available as a one-off, or as consulting through one or all phases of development.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="acc-item">
          <button class="acc-head" aria-expanded="false">
            <h3>Pre-production</h3>
            <span class="acc-right"><span class="mini-wave" aria-hidden="true"><span style="height:40%"></span><span style="height:80%"></span><span style="height:55%"></span><span style="height:95%"></span><span style="height:30%"></span></span><span class="plus">+</span></span>
          </button>
          <div class="acc-body"><p>A dedicated producer handles scheduling, research, scripting, and host and guest sourcing and briefing.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="acc-item">
          <button class="acc-head" aria-expanded="false">
            <h3>Behind the mic</h3>
            <span class="acc-right"><span class="mini-wave" aria-hidden="true"><span style="height:40%"></span><span style="height:80%"></span><span style="height:55%"></span><span style="height:95%"></span><span style="height:30%"></span></span><span class="plus">+</span></span>
          </button>
          <div class="acc-body"><p>Voice-over services including podcast hosting, intro, outro and advertising voice-over, plus client and guest coaching.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="acc-item">
          <button class="acc-head" aria-expanded="false">
            <h3>Production</h3>
            <span class="acc-right"><span class="mini-wave" aria-hidden="true"><span style="height:40%"></span><span style="height:80%"></span><span style="height:55%"></span><span style="height:95%"></span><span style="height:30%"></span></span><span class="plus">+</span></span>
          </button>
          <div class="acc-body"><p>Recording hosts and guests in studio or remotely, with music selection, editing and mastering handled end to end.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="acc-item">
          <button class="acc-head" aria-expanded="false">
            <h3>Distribution</h3>
            <span class="acc-right"><span class="mini-wave" aria-hidden="true"><span style="height:40%"></span><span style="height:80%"></span><span style="height:55%"></span><span style="height:95%"></span><span style="height:30%"></span></span><span class="plus">+</span></span>
          </button>
          <div class="acc-body"><p>Managing the launch and release of every episode, across all platforms.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="acc-item">
          <button class="acc-head" aria-expanded="false">
            <h3>Marketing</h3>
            <span class="acc-right"><span class="mini-wave" aria-hidden="true"><span style="height:40%"></span><span style="height:80%"></span><span style="height:55%"></span><span style="height:95%"></span><span style="height:30%"></span></span><span class="plus">+</span></span>
          </button>
          <div class="acc-body"><p>Strategy for audience reach and growth, discussed from day one so you're ready to roll out at launch and beyond.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="acc-item">
          <button class="acc-head" aria-expanded="false">
            <h3>Podcast audit &amp; workshops</h3>
            <span class="acc-right"><span class="mini-wave" aria-hidden="true"><span style="height:40%"></span><span style="height:80%"></span><span style="height:55%"></span><span style="height:95%"></span><span style="height:30%"></span></span><span class="plus">+</span></span>
          </button>
          <div class="acc-body"><p>A full review with a fresh ear, honest feedback and a clear-eyed read on positioning, plus workshops to build your team's skills.</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="about" class="zone-dark">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="section-head">
        <span class="eyebrow">About</span>
        <h2 style="color:var(--paper);">An independent agency, built on a decade in the studio.</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="eq-line" id="about-eq-line" aria-hidden="true"></div>
      <div class="about-grid">
        <div>
          <p>Watch and Listen Studios is an independent consultancy and production company working with brands and creators to produce the highest quality podcasts and growth strategies for real results.</p>
          <p>Nicole Goodman, founder of Watch and Listen Studios, has spent nearly a decade in the podcast industry, seven of those at Melbourne audio agency SoundCartel, where in 2020 she led the agency's rebrand from BE Media to SoundCartel.</p>
          <p>She's developed strategies and produced podcasts for brands including Subaru Australia, Cbus Super, The Churchill Trust, Berry Street, Leading Teams and Regional Training Hubs at the University of Sydney and University of Notre Dame.</p>
          <p>Nicole won Best Newcomer at the Australian Podcast Awards in 2018, for Dating Upside Down.</p>
          <p>Before podcasting, she spent close to twenty years in client services at agencies including Ogilvy and McCann, and client-side at companies including SEEK, Child Wise and various tech start-ups.</p>
          <p>Deeply creative, Nicole brings decades of theatre training together with strategic, brand and marketing chops to bring your podcast to life, and get it to the right audience.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="awards">
          <span class="eyebrow" style="margin-bottom:8px;display:block;">Awards</span>
          <div class="award"><span class="yr">2026</span><strong>IT Journalism Awards ("The Lizzies")</strong><span class="detail">Finalist, Business Essentials</span></div>
          <div class="award"><span class="yr">2025</span><strong>Australian Podcast Awards</strong><span class="detail">Finalist, Subaru &amp; Churchill Trust</span></div>
          <div class="award"><span class="yr">2018</span><strong>Australian Podcast Awards</strong><span class="detail">Winner, Dating Upside Down</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="podcasts" class="zone-light">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="section-head" style="margin-bottom:36px;">
        <span class="eyebrow">Podcasts</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pod-grid">

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-churchill">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="The Churchill Changemakers cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Innovation</span>
          <h3>The Churchill Changemakers</h3>
          <div class="client">The Churchill Trust</div>
          <p class="desc">Season 3 turns to impact, ten Churchill Fellows, years on from their fellowships, reveal what became of their big ideas. Hosted by Fellow Michelle Ainsworth.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/0LzmCIYq2vL4tRY3i4P9cC" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/the-churchill-changemakers/id1702280546" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-cbus">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Cbus Super Shift cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Superannuation</span>
          <h3>Cbus Super Shift</h3>
          <div class="client">Cbus Super</div>
          <p class="desc">Host Andrew Mackinnon, a Cbus Coordinator and an advice expert unpack what's enough to live well, how to track your super, and planning for what you leave behind.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/6vFHrG94vkAGoNszmzxOqk" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/cbus-super-shift/id1859815144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-subaru">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Great Australian Detour Kids' Cast cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Automotive / Kids</span>
          <h3>Great Australian Detour Kids' Cast</h3>
          <div class="client">Subaru</div>
          <p class="desc">Andrew Daddo takes families around Australia to meet its people, places, animals and food, with a quiz at the end of every episode.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/7ByM98IIixfqszu4NA9itL" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/subarus-great-australian-detour-kids-cast/id1691838674" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-berry">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Stories from Berry Street cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Not for profit</span>
          <h3>Stories from Berry Street</h3>
          <div class="client">Berry Street</div>
          <p class="desc">ABC's Richelle Hunt talks to the people at Berry Street tackling childhood trauma and family violence, and building safer homes for kids across Australia.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/1Exzzn8IMckcVPCgdCjocm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/stories-from-berry-street/id1760461331" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-sound-minds">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sound Minds cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Music software</span>
          <h3>Sound Minds</h3>
          <div class="client">Reason Studios</div>
          <p class="desc">Host Grace McCallum gets inside the studio and the minds of artists and producers, Tanya Doko, Eric Bazilian and more, chasing what "making it" really means, quickfire round included.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/0FM8CNRqtL2NdkEvwgMlgQ" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/sound-minds/id1589728805" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-electric-rodeo">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Electric Rodeo cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Sexual wellness</span>
          <h3>Electric Rodeo</h3>
          <div class="client">Adult Toy Megastore</div>
          <p class="desc">A New Zealand sexuality podcast on sex, pleasure and relationships, normal, messy, and a hell of a lot of fun. Ye-haw.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/1dHSKMjIsFfOJz9fZQ2OuU" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/the-electric-rodeo/id1509498203" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-real-deal">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="The REAL Deal cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Real estate &amp; infrastructure</span>
          <h3>The REAL Deal</h3>
          <div class="client">Dexus</div>
          <p class="desc">Former property editor Turi Condon sits down monthly with Dexus CEO Darren Steinberg and others, telling it how it is across the real asset sector.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/3G7exLRM67alHIflwZv5SY" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/the-real-deal/id1697784685" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-destination-medicine">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Destination Medicine cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Medicine</span>
          <h3>Destination Medicine</h3>
          <div class="client">Regional Training Hubs</div>
          <p class="desc">With 64-plus medical specialties on the table, relaxed conversations with doctors in rural and remote Australia on how they found their path to rural medicine.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/3SI7zqZjQnGTxBz8U4guaj" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/destination-medicine-podcast/id1483765462" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pod-card" id="pod-dating-upside-down">
          <div class="art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Dating Upside Down cover art"></div>
          <span class="pod-tag">Dating &amp; relationships</span>
          <h3>Dating Upside Down</h3>
          <div class="client">Independent</div>
          <p class="desc">Winner, Best Newcomer at the 2018 Australian Podcast Awards, the show that started it all for Watch and Listen Studios' founder.</p>
          <div class="badges">
            <a class="badge" href="https://open.spotify.com/show/7tcjsiyrSFn4zxSWxyWO9S" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spotify</a>
            <a class="badge" href="https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/dating-upside-down/id1347860506" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="contact" class="zone-dark">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="contact-panel">
        <div class="contact-grid">
          <div class="contact-info">
            <span class="eyebrow">Contact</span>
            <h2 style="font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,40px);margin-top:12px;">Book a free 30-minute call.</h2>
            <p style="margin-top:18px;color:var(--paper-dim);">Tell us what you're working on, or reach out directly with a couple of dates and times that you're available to talk.</p>
            <a class="email" href="mailto:watchandlistenstudios@gmail.com">watchandlistenstudios@gmail.com</a>
          </div>
          <form onsubmit="event.preventDefault(); this.querySelector('.submit-btn').textContent='Sent, thank you';">
            <div class="f-row">
              <div class="field"><label for="fname">First name *</label><input id="fname" required placeholder="First name"></div>
              <div class="field"><label for="lname">Last name *</label><input id="lname" required placeholder="Last name"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="f-row">
              <div class="field"><label for="email">Email *</label><input id="email" type="email" required placeholder="you@company.com"></div>
              <div class="field"><label for="company">Company *</label><input id="company" required placeholder="Company"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="field full">
              <label for="message">Message *</label>
              <textarea id="message" required placeholder="What are you working on, what dates and times are you free to talk and what kind of support are you looking for?"></textarea>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" class="submit-btn">Send message</button>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <footer class="zone-dark">
    <div class="wrap footer-inner">
      <span>&copy; 2026 Watch and Listen Studios</span>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicolegoodman29/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
    </div>
  </footer>
</main>

<script>
  (function(){
    const el = document.getElementById('about-eq-line');
    if(!el) return;
    for(let i=0;i<60;i++){
      const span = document.createElement('span');
      const h = 15 + Math.round(Math.abs(Math.sin(i * 0.4)) * 70 + Math.random()*15);
      span.style.height = Math.min(h,100) + '%';
      span.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.03) + 's';
      el.appendChild(span);
    }
  })();

  (function(){
    function seededRandom(seed){ let s = seed; return function(){ s = (s * 9301 + 49297) % 233280; return s / 233280; }; }
    document.querySelectorAll('.fingerprint').forEach(el=>{
      const seed = parseInt(el.dataset.seed || '1', 10);
      const rand = seededRandom(seed * 97);
      for(let i=0;i<22;i++){
        const h = 20 + Math.floor(rand() * 80);
        const span = document.createElement('span');
        span.style.height = h + '%';
        el.appendChild(span);
      }
    });
  })();

  document.querySelectorAll('.acc-head').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      const item = btn.closest('.acc-item');
      const isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
      document.querySelectorAll('.acc-item.open').forEach(i=>{
        i.classList.remove('open');
        i.querySelector('.acc-head').setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
      });
      if(!isOpen){
        item.classList.add('open');
        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');
      }
    });
  });

  // Reactive hero waveform glow: mouse and scroll responsive canvas overlay
  (function(){
    const canvas = document.getElementById("waveform");
    const hero = document.getElementById("hero");
    if(!canvas || !hero) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

    let width, height, dpr;
    let mouseX = 0.46;
    let mouseY = 0.48;
    let scrollPower = 0;
    let t = 0;
    let rafId;

    function resize() {
      dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
      width = hero.clientWidth;
      height = hero.clientHeight;
      canvas.width = width * dpr;
      canvas.height = height * dpr;
      canvas.style.width = width + "px";
      canvas.style.height = height + "px";
      ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
    }

    function pointerMove(e) {
      const r = hero.getBoundingClientRect();
      mouseX = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (e.clientX - r.left) / r.width));
      mouseY = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (e.clientY - r.top) / r.height));
    }

    function updateScroll() {
      const r = hero.getBoundingClientRect();
      const centre = r.top + r.height / 2;
      const viewportCentre = window.innerHeight / 2;
      scrollPower = Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(centre - viewportCentre) / window.innerHeight);
    }

    function draw() {
      t += 0.018;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);

      const baseline = height * 0.455;
      const startX = width * 0.30;
      const endX = width * 0.62;
      const bars = 190;
      const gap = (endX - startX) / bars;

      const pulse = 0.52 + Math.sin(t * 1.7) * 0.08;
      const cursorBoost = 0.35 + mouseX * 0.75;
      const scrollBoost = 0.75 + scrollPower * 0.55;

      const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(startX, 0, endX, 0);
      grad.addColorStop(0, "rgba(197,129,48,0.02)");
      grad.addColorStop(0.45, "rgba(236,166,76,0.32)");
      grad.addColorStop(0.72, "rgba(255,197,102,0.56)");
      grad.addColorStop(1, "rgba(197,129,48,0.08)");
      ctx.strokeStyle = grad;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(startX, baseline);
      ctx.lineTo(endX, baseline);
      ctx.stroke();

      for (let i = 0; i < bars; i++) {
        const x = startX + i * gap;
        const n1 = Math.sin(i * 0.19 + t * 2.1);
        const n2 = Math.sin(i * 0.047 - t * 1.2);
        const n3 = Math.sin(i * 0.31 + t * 0.6);

        const centreBias = Math.exp(-Math.pow((i / bars - 0.66) * 2.25, 2));
        const cursorBias = Math.exp(-Math.pow((i / bars - mouseX) * 4.2, 2));
        const organic = Math.abs(n1 * 0.55 + n2 * 0.35 + n3 * 0.2);

        const amp = (18 + 155 * organic * (0.28 + centreBias + cursorBias * 0.55))
          * pulse * cursorBoost * scrollBoost * (1.08 - mouseY * 0.35);

        const alpha = 0.12 + Math.min(0.55, amp / 280);
        const barGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x, baseline - amp, x, baseline + amp);
        barGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255,184,82,${alpha * 0.28})`);
        barGrad.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(255,218,141,${alpha})`);
        barGrad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(194,111,32,${alpha * 0.22})`);

        ctx.strokeStyle = barGrad;
        ctx.lineWidth = Math.max(1, gap * 0.28);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x, baseline - amp * 0.5);
        ctx.lineTo(x, baseline + amp * 0.5);
        ctx.stroke();
      }

      rafId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

    resize();
    updateScroll();

    if (prefersReducedMotion) {
      draw();
      cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
    } else {
      draw();
    }

    window.addEventListener("resize", resize);
    window.addEventListener("scroll", updateScroll, { passive: true });
    hero.addEventListener("pointermove", pointerMove, { passive: true });
  })();
</script>

</body>
</html>
